violations.text: Several refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC stated service is scheduled for today. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
Several pans of cheese were observed with date marks exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

3 pans of cheese were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

Salads and desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Label guidance provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Beverages were moved. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

Single service items (unassembled pizza boxes) are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
Several refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The auto-dispenser for quaternary ammonium sanitizer is dispensing at excess of 400 ppm. PIC diluted during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The non-food contact of several hotel pans had remnants of old sticker labels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Staff stated their certificate expired in December. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Working containers of oils/sauces and flour storage container are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

Cakes and salads packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the storage room. Staff moved to shelving. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Food storage containers (in walk-in) were not in good repair. Inspector observed chipped pieces on lids and bases. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on a prep unit cutting board and table in the kitchen area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Two light bulbs were observed missing in the hood. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The double-door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
1 door refrigerator for beverages were observed with an accumulation of water. Per PIC, work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Condensate lines observed above food prep sink and hot water tank to the left of prep sink. Partition required. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024
